requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11, 230 V / 50 Hz, Plug Type C/F Schuko (Finland / Tukes / RED Art. 3.1(a))
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11，230 V / 50 Hz，C/F型Schuko插头（芬兰 / Tukes / RED第3.1(a)条）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11，230 V / 50 Hz，C/F型Schuko插頭（芬蘭 / Tukes / RED第3.1(a)條）

summary.en: Electrical safety is an essential requirement under RED 2014/53/EU Article 3.1(a), cross-referenced to the Low Voltage Directive (LVD) 2014/35/EU objectives. For wireless consumer devices, the primary harmonised standard is EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements), which superseded EN 60950-1 (IT equipment) and EN 60065 (AV equipment) from 20 December 2020. EN IEC 62368-1 applies a hazard-based safety engineering (HBSE) approach, classifying energy sources by potential hazard and specifying safeguards proportional to the risk. Finnish mains supply is 230 V AC / 50 Hz (CENELEC standard voltage, consistent across the EU). Plug types in Finland are Type C (Europlug, 2-pin) and Type F (Schuko, 2-pin with earthing clips / grounding contacts) — the same plug types used across continental Europe. Products incorporating mains AC adapters or power supplies must be designed and tested to 230 V / 50 Hz; power supplies designed for 100–120 V (US/Japan) or 220 V 60 Hz (parts of Asia) are not compatible without modification. Tukes (Safety and Chemicals Agency / Turvallisuus- ja kemikaalivirasto) is the Finnish authority responsible for market surveillance of electrical product safety under LVD/RED Art. 3.1(a). Tukes has legal authority to order product recalls, market withdrawal, and import bans for electrically unsafe products.
summary.zh: 电气安全是RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(a)条的基本要求，交叉参照低压指令（LVD）2014/35/EU目标。对于无线消费设备，主要协调标准为EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021（音视频、信息和通信技术设备——安全要求），该标准于2020年12月20日取代EN 60950-1（IT设备）和EN 60065（音视频设备）。EN IEC 62368-1采用基于危害的安全工程（HBSE）方法，按潜在危害对能量源进行分类，并规定与风险相称的安全措施。芬兰市电供电为230 V交流电/50 Hz（CENELEC标准电压，欧盟统一标准）。芬兰的插头类型为C型（欧式插头，2针）和F型（Schuko，2针，带接地夹/接地触点）——与欧洲大陆使用的插头类型相同。包含市电交流电源适配器或电源的产品须按230 V/50 Hz进行设计和检测；为100-120 V（美国/日本）或220 V 60 Hz（部分亚洲地区）设计的电源未经改装不兼容。Tukes（安全和化学品局）是依据LVD/RED第3.1(a)条负责电气产品安全市场监管的芬兰主管机构。Tukes有权对电气不安全产品下令召回、撤市及禁止进口。
summary.zht: 電氣安全是RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(a)條的基本要求，交叉參照低壓指令（LVD）2014/35/EU目標。對於無線消費設備，主要協調標準為EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021（音視頻、信息和通信技術設備——安全要求），該標準於2020年12月20日取代EN 60950-1（IT設備）和EN 60065（音視頻設備）。EN IEC 62368-1採用基於危害的安全工程（HBSE）方法，按潛在危害對能量源進行分類，並規定與風險相稱的安全措施。芬蘭市電供電為230 V交流電/50 Hz（CENELEC標準電壓，歐盟統一標準）。芬蘭的插頭類型為C型（歐式插頭，2針）和F型（Schuko，2針，帶接地夾/接地觸點）——與歐洲大陸使用的插頭類型相同。包含市電交流電源適配器或電源的產品須按230 V/50 Hz進行設計和檢測；為100-120 V（美國/日本）或220 V 60 Hz（部分亞洲地區）設計的電源未經改裝不兼容。Tukes（安全和化學品局）是依據LVD/RED第3.1(a)條負責電氣產品安全市場監管的芬蘭主管機構。Tukes有權對電氣不安全產品下令召回、撤市及禁止進口。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(a) — health and safety essential requirement (cross-referenced to LVD objectives)
Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Low Voltage Directive; electrical safety for equipment operating between 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC
EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment safety (harmonised standard; supersedes EN 60950-1 and EN 60065)
CENELEC HD 60364 series — Low voltage electrical installations (230 V / 50 Hz EU standard voltage)
Plug standard Type C (CEE 7/16 Europlug) and Type F (CEE 7/4 Schuko) — Finnish electrical infrastructure
Tukes — Finnish authority for electrical product safety market surveillance

summary.en: China requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for electrical safety of consumer electronics sold in China, administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China). CCC electrical safety testing for IT and AV products is performed to GB 4943.1-2022 (Information technology equipment — Safety — Part 1: General requirements, aligned with IEC 62368-1:2018 — an earlier edition than the EU +A11 amendment). Chinese mains supply is 220 V AC / 50 Hz (domestic standard). Chinese plug types include Type A (2-flat-blade), Type I (3-pin angled blade, Australian-style), and Type C (Europlug compatible for some sockets) — differing from the Finnish/EU Type F Schuko standard. The GB 4943.1-2022 standard is based on an earlier version of IEC 62368-1 and does not incorporate the +A11 amendment to EN IEC 62368-1:2020 that is required for EU harmonised standard compliance. CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by Tukes or the EU and cannot substitute for EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 conformity required for CE marking.
summary.zh: 中国对在华销售消费电子产品的电气安全要求CCC（中国强制认证），由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。IT和音视频产品的CCC电气安全检测按GB 4943.1-2022（信息技术设备——安全——第1部分：通用要求，与IEC 62368-1:2018接轨——早于欧盟+A11修订版）进行。中国市电为220 V交流/50 Hz（国内标准）。中国插头类型包括A型（2平刀）、I型（3斜刀，澳大利亚式）和C型（部分插座兼容欧式插头）——与芬兰/欧盟F型Schuko标准不同。GB 4943.1-2022标准基于IEC 62368-1较早版本，未包含CE标志所需的欧盟协调标准EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11修订内容。CCC电气安全认证不被Tukes或欧盟认可，无法替代CE标志所需的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11合规。
summary.zht: 中國對在華銷售消費電子產品的電氣安全要求CCC（中國強制認證），由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。IT和音視頻產品的CCC電氣安全檢測按GB 4943.1-2022（信息技術設備——安全——第1部分：通用要求，與IEC 62368-1:2018接軌——早於歐盟+A11修訂版）進行。中國市電為220 V交流/50 Hz（國內標準）。中國插頭類型包括A型（2平刀）、I型（3斜刀，澳大利亞式）和C型（部分插座兼容歐式插頭）——與芬蘭/歐盟F型Schuko標準不同。GB 4943.1-2022標準基於IEC 62368-1較早版本，未包含CE標誌所需的歐盟協調標準EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11修訂內容。CCC電氣安全認證不被Tukes或歐盟認可，無法取代CE標誌所需的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11合規。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA; electrical safety for consumer electronics in China
GB 4943.1-2022 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 62368-1:2018; pre-A11 amendment)
GB 8898-2011 — Audio, video and similar electronic apparatus safety (China; pre-IEC 62368-1 transition)
220 V AC / 50 Hz — Chinese domestic mains voltage
Plug types A, I, C — Chinese domestic infrastructure (not compatible with Finnish Type F Schuko without adaptation)

gap.en: CCC electrical safety certification to Chinese GB standards cannot substitute for EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 conformity required for CE marking in Finland. Four specific gaps apply: (1) Standard version gap — GB 4943.1-2022 aligns with IEC 62368-1:2018, which predates the EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 amendment required for EU harmonised standard compliance; the +A11 amendment introduces specific European requirements (including modifications to insulation coordination and creepage/clearance distances) that must be addressed; (2) Mains voltage difference — Chinese products tested at 220 V / 50 Hz may not have been validated at 230 V / 50 Hz (European nominal); power supply components (transformers, capacitors, fuses) must be rated for 230 V operation; EN IEC 62368-1 testing must be performed at 230 V; (3) Plug compatibility — products for Finland must use Type C or Type F (Schuko) plugs; Chinese domestic plugs (Type A or I) are not compatible with Finnish sockets and must not be included in the EU market version; (4) Tukes enforcement — Tukes actively tests electrical products for safety compliance and has authority to order immediate market withdrawal for products found to be electrically unsafe; Chinese CCC certificates provide no defence in Finnish market surveillance proceedings. Manufacturers must obtain EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 test reports from accredited EU or ILAC/MRA member laboratories.
gap.zh: 按中国GB标准取得的CCC电气安全认证无法替代芬兰CE标志所需的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11合规。存在四项具体差距：（1）标准版本差距——GB 4943.1-2022与IEC 62368-1:2018接轨，早于欧盟协调标准合规所需的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021修订版；+A11修订引入了必须满足的欧洲特定要求（包括绝缘配合和爬电/间隙距离修改）；（2）市电电压差异——按220 V/50 Hz检测的中国产品可能未经230 V/50 Hz（欧洲标称电压）验证；电源元器件（变压器、电容、保险丝）须额定230 V运行；EN IEC 62368-1检测须在230 V下进行；（3）插头兼容性——面向芬兰的产品须使用C型或F型（Schuko）插头；中国国内插头（A型或I型）与芬兰插座不兼容，不得包含在欧盟市场版本中；（4）Tukes执法——Tukes积极对电气产品进行安全合规检测，有权对发现电气不安全的产品立即下令撤市；中国CCC证书在芬兰市场监管程序中不构成抗辩。制造商须从获认可的欧盟或ILAC/MRA成员实验室取得EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11测试报告。
gap.zht: 按中國GB標準取得的CCC電氣安全認證無法取代芬蘭CE標誌所需的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11合規。存在四項具體差距：（1）標準版本差距——GB 4943.1-2022與IEC 62368-1:2018接軌，早於歐盟協調標準合規所需的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021修訂版；+A11修訂引入了必須滿足的歐洲特定要求（包括絕緣配合和爬電/間隙距離修改）；（2）市電電壓差異——按220 V/50 Hz檢測的中國產品可能未經230 V/50 Hz（歐洲標稱電壓）驗證；電源元器件（變壓器、電容、保險絲）須額定230 V運行；EN IEC 62368-1檢測須在230 V下進行；（3）插頭兼容性——面向芬蘭的產品須使用C型或F型（Schuko）插頭；中國國內插頭（A型或I型）與芬蘭插座不兼容，不得包含在歐盟市場版本中；（4）Tukes執法——Tukes積極對電氣產品進行安全合規檢測，有權對發現電氣不安全的產品立即下令撤市；中國CCC證書在芬蘭市場監管程序中不構成抗辯。製造商須從獲認可的歐盟或ILAC/MRA成員實驗室取得EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(a) essential requirement; EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 is the required harmonised standard; 230 V / 50 Hz design and testing required; Type C/F Schuko plug required for Finland; enforced by Tukes
mandatory_status.cn: CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1-2022 is mandatory for the Chinese domestic market at 220 V; not recognised in Finland or the EU

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity to EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 is mandatory for wireless devices placed on the Finnish market under RED Art. 3.1(a). CCC certification to GB 4943.1-2022 is not recognised by Tukes and cannot substitute for EU harmonised standard compliance. Products must be tested at 230 V / 50 Hz, use Type C or F (Schuko) plugs, and incorporate the +A11 amendment requirements. Test reports must come from accredited EU or ILAC/MRA member laboratories. Tukes actively enforces electrical product safety in Finland and can order immediate market withdrawal for unsafe products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021的电气安全合规对RED第3.1(a)条规定的投放芬兰市场无线设备为强制要求。按GB 4943.1-2022取得的CCC认证不被Tukes认可，无法替代欧盟协调标准合规。产品须在230 V/50 Hz下检测、使用C型或F型（Schuko）插头并满足+A11修订要求。测试报告须来自获认可的欧盟或ILAC/MRA成员实验室。Tukes在芬兰积极执行电气产品安全规定，可对不安全产品立即下令撤市。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021的電氣安全合規對RED第3.1(a)條規定的投放芬蘭市場無線設備為強制要求。按GB 4943.1-2022取得的CCC認證不被Tukes認可，無法取代歐盟協調標準合規。產品須在230 V/50 Hz下檢測、使用C型或F型（Schuko）插頭並滿足+A11修訂要求。測試報告須來自獲認可的歐盟或ILAC/MRA成員實驗室。Tukes在芬蘭積極執行電氣產品安全規定，可對不安全產品立即下令撤市。
